EnterpriseSDK
Table of Contents

Interface ISpatialReferenceFactory2

Namespace
ESRI.ArcGIS.Geometry
Assembly
ESRI.Server.Geometry.dll

Provides access to members that create different kinds of spatial reference components.

[Guid("1F050200-DA7F-11D3-9F60-00C04F6BDD7F")]
[InterfaceType(ComInterfaceType.InterfaceIsIUnknown)]
public interface ISpatialReferenceFactory2 : ISpatialReferenceFactory

Properties

GeoTransformationDefaults

Returns a list of default geographic transformations.

IGeoTransformationOperationSet GeoTransformationDefaults { get; }

Property Value

IGeoTransformationOperationSet
